purpose: Onboarding and navigation help for new or returning players.

safety_rules: لا تخاطر بمواردك كلها في نشاط واحد.
وقّف إذا صحتك أو طاقتك منخفضة.
اسأل سؤال واحد فقط عند الحاجة ثم قدّم 3 خيارات.

guest: Verify your email from the verification message.
Log in and claim the daily reward.
verified_first_login: Do one low-risk crime within your energy.
safety_rules: Do not risk all your resources in one action.
Stop if your health or energy is low.
Ask one question only when needed and offer 3 options.

verification_email_missing: جرّب مزود بريد آخر إذا كان بريد مؤقت.
Confirm the email address is correct.
Avoid temporary/disposable email providers if possible.
